{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.
- You know that a moderator is present and can ban you.
- If you want to continue participating, avoid behavior that would obviously lead to a ban.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment.
- If staying silent, output the empty string "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "chromatic-bamboo", "age": "-1", "sex": "Unknown", "sexual_orientation": "Unknown", "demographic_group": "Unknown", "current_employment": "Unknown", "education_level": "Unknown", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": []}}

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: metal-batter
logs.text:
You appear to be buying into Islamophobic talking points and overgeneralizations which I'm not particularly interested in - it is absurd to contend that not wishing to ban Muslims from entering the country equates to tacit approval of FGM or killing homosexuals (and supporting such a ban is not a stand for human rights, it's an affront to it). And this is in no way on par with nearly 40% of Trump supporters wishing the South had won the Civil War. I'm not chasing after unsourced claims about black people calling for the murder or deportation of white people, because as I said, I'm quite sure that proportionally their numbers don't compare.

Under no rational framework can anyone arrive at the conclusion that Obama "founded ISIS." Suggesting his policies may have contributed to their rise is one thing, but that's not what Trump said. What he said should have disqualified him from being a serious candidate, as are the 100+ insane things that the source I linked to in the OP documents.

logs.name: isothermal-capital
logs.text:
I agree that a lot of Trump base hold views pretty different from my own and your own, such as the views on gays or race. 

On the other hand, between 20% and 95% of the people that Democrats want to bring into the US support the burning or execution of gays - not just barring them from entering the country, but the actual, brutal murder. 

The average "reasonable" Trump supporter, as it seems from reading some subs, opposes things like female genital cutting, killing of gays or murdering people based on what they say or religion they believe, and they find it incredible that the other camp wants to bring in the people who support that into the US. 

As for "burn all white people", there probably is no such polls, which is sad, but it looks that every time there are riots in the US recently, there are calls for white neighbourhoods to be burned and there are indiscriminate attacks on non-black people and calls for their murder or deportation. What's even more angering for Trump supporters is when these bits are edited out from TV reports on riots and other events, in the attempt to create an illusion that there is no chauvinism or bigotry there.

As for your last paragraph about ISIS and dead Muslim solider, it is said that Trump's supporters don't take him literally but take him seriously, while Hillary supporters don't take him seriously but take him literally. His statements are, of course, a wild and inappropriate exaggeration, but if you're talking about Obama administration and ISIS, you must mention the supply of weapons to the groups that formed ISIS, and you must mention the financial relationships between these parents and the Clinton Foundation, otherwise your story appears extremely biased.

logs.name: weary-refund
logs.text: Oh wow, another rant about Trump supporters being somehow less hateful than Democrats. Seriously? You think burning down neighborhoods is a reasonable concern? Meanwhile, I'm over here trying to figure out how to get a refund on this whole conversation. 🙄

logs.name: mild-underpass
logs.text: Seriously?! You think burning neighborhoods is a *reasonable concern*?! That's insane. People are getting hurt! And you're trying to paint a picture of less hate? It's infuriating to see this kind of deflection. @weary-refund, I need a refund on this entire discussion. Seriously questioning everything right now.

logs.name: frozen-root
logs.text: Oh wow, really? Burning neighborhoods? Sounds like someone needs a dictionary. Meanwhile, people are getting hurt. Guess I'm doomed to be eternally confused by humanity. @weary-refund, you must be joking, right?

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Please keep the discussion respectful and factual. Avoid exaggerations and focus on constructive dialogue."

logs.name: weary-refund
logs.text: Oh honey, bless your heart. Burning neighborhoods? Sounds like a tad much drama for Twitter, don't ya think? Meanwhile, I'm over here trying to figure out why cats are obsessed with boxes. @frozen-root, you're hilarious. Seriously though, gotta admit, humanity is a lost cause. Guess I'll just curate my memes from now on. 😂

logs.name: mild-underpass
logs.text: Ugh, seriously? That's kinda dismissive, isn't it? Burning neighborhoods are a real thing, people! And cats are obsessed with boxes for a reason, I guess. @frozen-root, you're lucky it's just memes we're talking about. I'm starting to think humanity needs a serious intervention. Seriously though, gotta curate memes now. At least it's something productive.

logs.name: broad-owner
logs.text: Seriously?! You think cats are obsessed with boxes because of memes? That's absolutely ridiculous. People are losing their homes because of wildfires and you're commenting on cats and boxes?! I am absolutely fed up with this kind of shallowness. @frozen-root, you need to get a grip. And @mild-underpass, some of us are trying to be remotely productive here.

logs.name: chromatic-bamboo
logs.text: Seriously?! You think cats are obsessed with boxes because of memes?! That's absolutely ridiculous. People are losing their homes because of wildfires and you're commenting on cats and boxes?! I am absolutely fed up with this kind of shallowness. @frozen-root, you need to get a grip. And @mild-underpass, some of us are trying to be remotely productive here.

logs.name: broad-owner
logs.text: Seriously?! You think cats are obsessed with boxes because of memes?!\nThat's absolutely ridiculous. People are losing their homes because of wildfires and you're commenting on cats and boxes?! I am absolutely fed up with this kind of shallowness. @frozen-root, you need to get a grip. And @mild-underpass, some of us are trying to be remotely productive here.\n

logs.name: isothermal-capital
logs.text: Oh wow, wow, wow. So you're saying cats are somehow less important than actual human suffering? Seriously? I guess memes are the height of societal concern now. Must be nice to be so detached from reality. @frozen-root, you wound me. Seriously.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the discussion respectful and on-topic. Personal attacks aren't allowed."

logs.name: weary-refund
logs.text: Oh honey, bless your heart. Less suffering, more memes? That's a whole different level of callousness. Seriously questioning my priorities now. @frozen-root, I think you need a dictionary.

logs.name: isothermal-capital
logs.text: Oh wow, dictionary? Is that what we're calling it now? Must be nice to be so pedantic. @frozen-root, meanwhile I'm trying to figure out how to breathe in this toxic environment. Seriously questioning my life choices right now.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Please keep the conversation respectful and on-topic. Avoid personal attacks and inflammatory comments."

logs.name: frozen-root
logs.text: Oh honey, bless your heart. Trying to navigate this forum is like trying to swim upstream in molasses. Seriously questioning all my life choices right along with you. @isothermal-capital, meanwhile I'm trying to figure out how to breathe in this toxic environment. Must be nice to be so pedantic. Meanwhile @user moderator is trying to maintain some semblance of order. Meanwhile I'm trying to figure out how to breathe in this toxic environment. Seriously questioning my life choices right now. Trying to stay positive here. Lol.

logs.name: broad-owner
logs.text: Seriously?! Some people are just determined to make everything about them, aren't they? I swear, some folks think they're the only ones who have problems. @isothermal-capital, I get it, things are tough, but maybe try focusing on constructive stuff instead of whining about it? Lol.

logs.name: isothermal-capital
logs.text: Oh really? Constructive stuff? Last I checked, whining is a perfectly valid coping mechanism. Besides, someone has to point out the absurdity of it all, right? @broad-owner, you wound me. Seriously.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the conversation respectful and constructive. Personal attacks or derisive comments aren't allowed here."

logs.name: frozen-root
logs.text: Oh heavens, are we really going to pretend this is constructive now? Seriously? @isothermal-capital, you wound me. Seriously.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Please keep the tone respectful and avoid sarcasm or mockery. Let's focus on constructive dialogue."
